channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Stories
channel.description: Packed Instagram-Story autolist — business, property, jobs and internships in one feed. Each item ships with a 1080×1920 story card and a 'Read more on Mutapa Times' CTA.

item.title: Zimbabwe edge out Bangladesh again to secure ODI series win @Reuters
item.description: via Reuters #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: Zim exports wildlife to Equatorial Guinea @NewsDayZimbabwe
item.description: via NewsDay Zimbabwe #Zimbabwe #Tech #AfricaTech #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: NewsDay Zimbabwe

item.title: Zimbabwe plans to translocate zebras, giraffes, hyenas to Equatorial Guinea @NewsDayZimbabwe
item.description: via NewsDay Zimbabwe #Zimbabwe #Tech #AfricaTech #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: NewsDay Zimbabwe

item.title: Hwange-Nationalpark: Zimbabwe’s Giant Wild Sanctuary
item.description: via Ad-hoc-news.de #Zimbabwe #Tech #AfricaTech #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Ad-hoc-news.de

item.title: Zimbabwe reduces fuel price again @3menonaboat
item.description:
The new prices will remain in effect for the next two weeks.

The post Zimbabwe reduces fuel price again first appeared on Three Men On a Boat.

via Three Men On Boat #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Three Men On Boat

item.title: ZERA Cuts Fuel Prices Again as Diesel and Petrol Costs Drop
item.description: ZERA Cuts Fuel Prices Again as Diesel and Petrol Costs Drop The Zimbabwe Energy Regulatory Authority (ZERA) has lowered the maximum prices of diesel and petrol, giving motorists another round of relief after announcing its second fuel price reduction in less than a month. The rev via Iharare News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Zimbabwe begins blueberry exports to China as it targets a $400 million market
item.description: Business Insider Africa Zimbabwe has officially begun exporting fresh blueberries to China, opening one of the world’s fastest-growing consumer markets to one of Africa’s fastest-expanding horticultural industries. The first shipment follows the signing of a phytosanitary protoco via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: ZIFA dismisses Hardrock FC appeal, clears way for Dynamos match to resume
item.description: The Zimbabwe Football Association (ZIFA) Appeals Committee has dismissed Hardrock FC’s appeal against a ruling ordering the resumption of its abandoned Castle Lager Premier Soccer League match against Dynamos, clearing the way for the fixture to proceed as scheduled on Thursday. via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Tech #AfricaTech #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Mayor’s dry jokes on service delivery anger residents @zimsituation
item.description: Source: Mayor’s dry jokes on service delivery anger residents -Newsday Zimbabwe HARARE, Jul 8 (NewsDay Live- Mayor Jacob Mafume has come under fire from residents for allegedly trivialising service delivery issues by jokingly responding to concerns raised at a public meeting. Maf via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: Air Zimbabwe to resume direct London flights after 15-year absence @nehandaradio
item.description: Air Zimbabwe will resume direct flights between Harare and London by the end of July, restoring a route that has been suspended since 2011. The post Air Zimbabwe to resume direct London flights after 15-year absence appeared first on Nehanda Radio. #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nehanda Radio

item.title: Etihad, Fastjet launch mega alliance
item.description: Tapiwa ChirumeSTAFF WRITERGLOBAL aviation heavyweight Etihad Airways has struck a massive commercial partnership with Fastjet Zimbabwe, transforming air travel into the country.The... item.title: Sweden demands inclusive child protection systems
item.description: Hazel Marimbizain Bulawayo SWEDEN has implored Zimbabwe to place children with disabilities at the centre of its child protection efforts, warning that... To access this content, please purchase a subscription by clicking the button below and select a package of your choice! Subs via Dailynews #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews

item.title: Funeral parade for Maj-Gen (Rtd) Ruwodo
item.description: Herald Reporter A FUNERAL parade will be held today in honour of Major-General (Retired) Richard Ruwodo at Charles Gumbo Barracks in Harare. Commander Zimbabwe Defence Forces, General Emmanuel Matatu, will... via Ebusiness Weekly #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews

item.title: Chevrons banking on potent pace attack to finish off Bangladesh challenge
item.description: Tinashe Kusema THE Zimbabwe Chevrons head into today’s second One Day International at Harare Sports Club with momentum firmly on their side after a dominant run of performances against Bangladesh.... via Ebusiness Weekly #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Ebusiness Weekly

item.title: Junior Social Media Assistant — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Help grow our social channels. Pitch fresh formats and ideas. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Junior Editorial Coordinator — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Pitch, draft and edit original explainers. Bring fresh editorial angles. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Junior Data Analyst — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Turn Zimbabwe public data into clear visual stories. Bring new data ideas. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Business Development Associate — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
